category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates, extracts, and modifies Windows Imaging files; official wimlib homepage describes an open source cross-platform Windows Imaging library and wimlib-imagex frontend.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wimlib; official homepage title and project description use wimlib.
docs_sources: Official wimlib homepage hosts wimlib-imagex documentation links and states documentation is included and hosted there; official API docs are under wimlib.net/apidoc.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official wimlib homepage says the source code is maintained in a git repository at https://wimlib.net/git/wimlib and distinguishes GitHub as a mirror.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable list identify WIM manipulation tools; official homepage describes archive, imaging, library, and command-line frontend capabilities.
